name: @borjie/memory-v2
description: Memory v2 — six-layer cognitive memory: episodic (bi-temporal facts), narrative arcs, procedural skills (Voyager promotion), reflective notes (Reflexion), topic files, cohort cache. Ports-based — inject a store + embedder; works with Postgres/Redis/in-memory adapters. Ported from LITFIN PROJECT/src/core/memory.
